name: Word Documents
description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents (.docx). Supports formatting, tables of contents, headings, page numbers, letterheads, tracked changes, comments, and more.

name: PDF Processing
description: Extract text and tables from PDFs, merge or split documents, rotate pages, add watermarks, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt, extract images, and OCR scanned PDFs.

name: Presentations
description: Create slide decks, pitch decks, and presentations. Read, parse, edit, or extract content from .pptx files. Work with templates, layouts, speaker notes, and comments.

name: Spreadsheets
description: Open, read, edit, or create Excel spreadsheets. Supports formulas, formatting, charts, data cleaning, and conversion between tabular formats (.xlsx, .csv, .tsv).

name: MindPal Builder
description: Build AI agents and multi-agent workflows on MindPal.space. Configure system instructions, design workflows, set up knowledge sources, and troubleshoot builds.

name: Skill Creator
description: Create new skills from scratch, modify and improve existing skills, run evals to test performance, benchmark with variance analysis, and optimize descriptions for better triggering.

name: Scheduled Tasks
description: Create reusable scheduled tasks that can run on demand or automatically on an interval. Turn any workflow into a repeatable, automated process.

name: UI Kit
description: Reusable React + Tailwind component library with Modal, Card, SearchInput, Tabs, CopyBlock, and Badge. Includes a full design system with colors, typography, spacing, and layout patterns. Use when building any UI page, panel, dashboard, or admin interface.
